017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ObjectUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
022
023import java.io.*;
024import java.util.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
032
033/**
034 * Session for parsing Hjson format into POJOs.
035 */
036@SuppressWarnings({
037   "java:S110",  // Inheritance depth acceptable for parser session hierarchy
038   "java:S115",  // ARG_ctx follows project assertion-param naming convention
039   "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for Hjson parse logic
040   "java:S6541", // Acceptable for session implementation
041   "unchecked",  // (T) casts in doParse for generic return type
042   "resource"    // Closeable resources are owned by the caller's parser session; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
043})
044public class HjsonParserSession extends ReaderParserSession implements RecordReadable {
045
046   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
047
048   /**
049    * Builder for Hjson parser session.
050    */
051   public static class Builder extends ReaderParserSession.Builder<Builder> {
052
053      protected Builder(HjsonParser ctx) {
054         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
055      }
056
057      @Override
058      public HjsonParserSession build() {
059         return new HjsonParserSession(this);
060      }
061   }
062
063   /**
064    * Creates a session builder.
065    *
066    * @param ctx The parser context.
067    * @return The builder.
068    */
069   public static Builder create(HjsonParser ctx) {
070      return new Builder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
071   }
072
073   protected HjsonParserSession(Builder builder) {
074      super(builder);
075   }
076
077   @Override /* RecordReadable */
078   public RecordReader parseRecords(Object input) throws IOException {
079      return RecordAdapter.reader(this, input);
080   }
081
082   @Override /* RecordReadable */
083   public boolean isRecordStreaming() {
084      return false;
085   }
086
087   @Override
088   protected <T> T doParse(ParserPipe pipe, ClassMeta<T> type) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
089      String inputStr;
090      try {
091         inputStr = pipe.asString();
092      } catch (IOException e) {
093         throw new ParseException(e);
094      }
095      if (inputStr == null)
096         return null;
097      var trimmed = inputStr.trim();
098      if (trimmed.isEmpty())
099         return null;
100      var tokenizer = new HjsonTokenizer(new StringReader(inputStr));
101      tokenizer.skipWhitespaceAndComments();
102      var peek = tokenizer.peek();
103      if (peek.type() == HjsonTokenizer.TokenType.EOF)
104         return null;
105      var peekType = peek.type();
106      // LBRACE/LBRACKET -> parseValue (object/array)
107      if (peekType == HjsonTokenizer.TokenType.LBRACE || peekType == HjsonTokenizer.TokenType.LBRACKET) {
108         return (T) parseValue(tokenizer, type);
109      }
110      // QUOTELESS/STRING: distinguish braceless root "key: value" from lone value "string"
111      if (peekType == HjsonTokenizer.TokenType.QUOTELESS || peekType == HjsonTokenizer.TokenType.STRING) {
112         var firstToken = tokenizer.read();
113         var firstVal = firstToken.stringValue();
114         tokenizer.skipWhitespaceAndComments();
115         var nextType = tokenizer.peek().type();
116         // Target is String/number/boolean/etc - always lone value (not key:value map)
117         if (!type.isMap() && !type.isBean())
118            return (T) coerceMemberValue(firstVal, type);
119         // Target is Map/Bean: COLON means key:value (braceless root)
120         if (nextType == HjsonTokenizer.TokenType.COLON)
121            return (T) parseRootBraceless(tokenizer, type, firstVal);
122         // No COLON - lone value (e.g. "1.0" or "true" tokenized as QUOTELESS)
123         return (T) coerceMemberValue(firstVal, type);
124      }
125      // NUMBER, TRUE, FALSE, NULL, etc - lone value; use (T) not type.cast (cast fails for boxed->primitive)
126      return (T) coerceMemberValue(parseValue(tokenizer, type), type);
127   }
128
129   private Object parseRootBraceless(HjsonTokenizer t, ClassMeta<?> type, String firstKey) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
130      var result = newGenericMap();
131      // Same per-property type threading as parseObject so braceless-root beans get typed-map keys (Bug #7b).
132      var beanMeta = (type != null && type.isBean()) ? type.getBeanMeta() : null;
133      if (t.read().type() != HjsonTokenizer.TokenType.COLON)
134         throw new ParseException(this, "Expected ':' after key at line {0}", t.getLine());
135      t.skipWhitespaceAndComments();
136      var value = parseValue(t, propertyType(beanMeta, firstKey, type));
137      result.put(firstKey, value);
138      t.skipWhitespaceAndComments();
139      if (t.peek().type() == HjsonTokenizer.TokenType.NEWLINE)
140         t.read();
141      while (t.peek().type() != HjsonTokenizer.TokenType.EOF) {
142         var key = readKey(t);
143         t.skipWhitespaceAndComments();
144         if (t.read().type() != HjsonTokenizer.TokenType.COLON)
145            throw new ParseException(this, "Expected ':' after key at line {0}", t.getLine());
146         t.skipWhitespaceAndComments();
147         value = parseValue(t, propertyType(beanMeta, key, type));
148         result.put(key, value);
149         t.skipWhitespaceAndComments();
150         if (t.peek().type() == HjsonTokenizer.TokenType.NEWLINE)
151            t.read();
152      }
153      return convertToBean(result, type);
154   }
155
156   private Object parseValue(HjsonTokenizer t, ClassMeta<?> type) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
157      var tok = t.read();
158      Object raw = switch (tok.type()) {
159         case STRING, QUOTELESS, MULTILINE -> isTrimStrings() ? tok.stringValue().trim() : tok.stringValue();
160         case NUMBER -> tok.numberValue();
161         case TRUE -> true;
162         case FALSE -> false;
163         case NULL -> null;
164         case LBRACE -> parseObject(t, type);
165         case LBRACKET -> parseArray(t, type);
166         case EOF -> null;
167         default -> throw new ParseException(this, "Unexpected token {0} at line {1}", tok.type(), t.getLine());
168      };
169      if (raw == null)
170         return null;
171      if (tok.type() == HjsonTokenizer.TokenType.LBRACE || tok.type() == HjsonTokenizer.TokenType.LBRACKET)
172         return raw;
173      return coerceMemberValue(raw, type);
174   }
175
176   private Object parseObject(HjsonTokenizer t, ClassMeta<?> type) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
177      var result = newGenericMap();
178      // When parsing a typed Bean, look up per-property ClassMetas so that nested Map<K,V> properties
179      // see their declared key/value types and the key coercion in the inner parseObject can fire
180      // (matches JsonParserSession.parseIntoBeanMap2 / parseIntoMap2 pattern).
181      var beanMeta = (type != null && type.isBean()) ? type.getBeanMeta() : null;
182      t.skipWhitespaceAndComments();
183      var next = t.peek();
184      if (next.type() == HjsonTokenizer.TokenType.RBRACE) {
185         t.read();
186         return convertToBean(result, type);
187      }
188      while (true) {
189         var key = readKey(t);
190         t.skipWhitespaceAndComments();
191         if (t.read().type() != HjsonTokenizer.TokenType.COLON)
192            throw new ParseException(this, "Expected ':' after key at line {0}", t.getLine());
193         t.skipWhitespaceAndComments();
194         var valueType = propertyType(beanMeta, key, type);
195         var value = parseValue(t, valueType);
196         result.put(key, value);
197         t.skipWhitespaceAndComments();
198         next = t.peek();
199         if (next.type() == HjsonTokenizer.TokenType.RBRACE) {
200            t.read();
201            break;
202         }
203         if (next.type() == HjsonTokenizer.TokenType.COMMA || next.type() == HjsonTokenizer.TokenType.NEWLINE) {
204            t.read();
205            t.skipWhitespaceAndComments();
206         }
207      }
208      return convertToBean(result, type);
209   }
210
211   /**
212    * Coerces a parsed scalar value to the expected type, honoring session-aware default swaps for
213    * {@code byte[]} targets at the collection-element / top-level dispatch sites (Bug #12).
214    *
215    * <p>For all other targets this is a transparent wrapper over {@link #convertToMemberType} so the
216    * existing dispatch behavior is preserved.  The narrow {@code byte[]} hook lets the configured
217    * {@link BinaryFormat}'s variant {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.swaps.BinarySwap} unswap the wire-form
218    * string back into raw bytes — these dispatch sites don't go through
219    * {@code MarshalledPropertyPostProcessor}'s per-property swap install, so without this they fall
220    * through to {@code BasicConverter}'s default {@code String → byte[]} UTF-8 coercion.
221    */
222   private Object coerceMemberValue(Object raw, ClassMeta<?> type) throws ParseException {
223      if (raw instanceof String s && type != null && type.inner() == byte[].class) {
224         var swap = type.getSwap(this);
225         if (swap != null)
226            return unswap(swap, s, type);
227      }
228      return convertToMemberType(null, raw, type);
229   }
230
231   /**
232    * Resolves the {@link ClassMeta} to parse a bean-property value against, falling back to {@code object()}
233    * when the enclosing type isn't a bean or the key isn't a known property.  Threading the property type
234    * lets typed-map properties (e.g. {@code Map<TestEnum,String>}) coerce their keys via the converter's
235    * {@code Map → Map} path (Bug #7b).
236    *
237    * <p>
238    * Extended in Bug #12 to also surface {@link ClassMeta#isCollectionOrArray()} property types so the
239    * collection-element dispatch in {@link #parseArray} threads the parent's element type into recursion —
240    * that's where {@link #coerceMemberValue} reads the {@code byte[]} target and invokes the configured
241    * {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.swaps.BinarySwap}'s unswap on the wire-form string.  Other property shapes
242    * (Optional, primitive, bean) still pass through as {@code object()} so this parser's lazy-typed
243    * conversion path keeps working unchanged.
244    */
245   private ClassMeta<?> propertyType(BeanMeta<?> beanMeta, String key, ClassMeta<?> enclosingType) {
246      if (beanMeta != null && key != null && !key.equals(getBeanTypePropertyName(enclosingType))) {
247         var pMeta = beanMeta.getPropertyMeta(key);
248         if (pMeta != null) {
249            var cm = (ClassMeta<?>) pMeta.getBeanInfo();
250            if (cm != null && (cm.isMap() || cm.isCollectionOrArray()))
251               return cm;
252         }
253      }
254      return object();
255   }
256
257   private String readKey(HjsonTokenizer t) throws IOException {
258      var tok = t.read();
259      return switch (tok.type()) {
260         case STRING, QUOTELESS, MULTILINE -> isTrimStrings() ? tok.stringValue().trim() : tok.stringValue();
261         case NULL -> null;  // null keyword used as key -> preserve as null (matches JSON parser behavior)
262         case TRUE -> "true";
263         case FALSE -> "false";
264         case NUMBER -> tok.numberValue().toString();
265         default -> throw new ParseException(this, "Expected key at line {0}", t.getLine());
266      };
267   }
268
269   private Object parseArray(HjsonTokenizer t, ClassMeta<?> type) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
270      if (type == null)
271         type = object();
272      var result = new JsonList();
273      t.skipWhitespaceAndComments();
274      var next = t.peek();
275      if (next.type() == HjsonTokenizer.TokenType.RBRACKET) {
276         t.read();
277         return convertToCollection(result, type);
278      }
279      while (true) {
280         var eType = coalesce(type.getElementType(), object());
281         result.add(parseValue(t, eType));
282         t.skipWhitespaceAndComments();
283         next = t.peek();
284         if (next.type() == HjsonTokenizer.TokenType.RBRACKET) {
285            t.read();
286            break;
287         }
288         if (next.type() == HjsonTokenizer.TokenType.COMMA || next.type() == HjsonTokenizer.TokenType.NEWLINE) {
289            t.read();
290            t.skipWhitespaceAndComments();
291         }
292      }
293      return convertToCollection(result, type);
294   }
295
296   private Object convertToBean(MarshalledMap map, ClassMeta<?> type) throws ExecutableException, ParseException {
297      if (type == null)
298         type = object();
299      var casted = cast(map, null, type);
300      if (casted != map)
301         return casted;
302      if (!type.isObject()) {
303         // If target type has a swap (e.g. surrogate D1→D2), parse JsonMap as swap class first, then unswap.
304         var swap = type.getSwap(this);
305         if (nn(swap)) {
306            var sType = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
307            var swapped = convertToMemberType(null, map, sType);
308            return unswap(swap, swapped, type);
309         }
310         var result = convertToMemberType(null, map, type);
311         if (type.isBean() && result != null)
312            injectAnnotations(map, result);
313         return result;
314      }
315      return map;
316   }
317
318   private void injectAnnotations(MarshalledMap map, Object bean) throws ExecutableException {
319      var bm = toBeanMap(bean);
320      for (var entry : map.entrySet()) {
321         var key = entry.getKey();
322         var pm = bm.getPropertyMeta(key);
323         var val = (pm == null) ? null : getBeanValueSafely(bm, key);
324         if (pm == null || val == null)
325            continue;
326         var cm = (ClassMeta<?>) pm.getBeanInfo();
327         if (cm.getNameProperty() != null)
328            setName(cm, val, key);
329         if (cm.getParentProperty() != null)
330            setParent(cm, val, bean);
331         if (cm.isMap() && val instanceof Map<?,?> val2 && !cm.getValueType().isObject() && cm.getValueType().getNameProperty() != null) {
332            var valueType = cm.getValueType();
333            for (Map.Entry<?, ?> e : ((Map<?,?>)val2).entrySet())
334               setName(valueType, e.getValue(), e.getKey());
335         }
336      }
337   }
338
339   private static Object getBeanValueSafely(BeanMap<?> bm, String key) {
340      try {
341         return bm.get(key);
342      } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") Exception e) {
343         return null;
344      }
345   }
346
347   private Object convertToCollection(MarshalledList list, ClassMeta<?> type) throws ExecutableException {
348      if (type == null)
349         type = object();
350      var eType = coalesce(type.getElementType(), object());
351      var converted = newGenericList();
352      for (var item : list)
353         converted.add(convertToMemberType(null, item, eType));
354      // For array types, convert to the appropriate array
355      if (type.inner() != null && type.inner().isArray())
356         return toArray(type, converted);
357      // For specific collection subtypes (e.g. Vector, LinkedList), convert via MarshallingSession
358      if (!type.isObject())
359         return convertToMemberType(null, converted, type);
360      return converted;
361   }
362}
